final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [3:0] D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (WE) begin
            Q <= D; // Write data to the cell
        end
        // No else statement, Q retains its value when WE is low
    end
endmodule
